name: First Majestic Silver Corp.
description: First Majestic Silver is a Vancouver-based mining company focused on silver and gold production from four wholly-owned operating mines in Mexico: Santa Elena in Sonora, San Dimas in Durango, Los Gatos in Chihuahua (70% interest), and La Encantada in Coahuila. The company is dual-listed on the TSX and NYSE under the symbol AG and is recognized as one of the largest primary silver producers in the world. First Majestic is in the production stage with a fully operating mine fleet in Mexico.
